name: Gosalyn Mallard
subtitle: The Quiverwing Quack
rulesText: \Heroic Intervention\ When you play this character, you may ready chosen character with cost 2 or less. If you do, they can't quest or challenge for the rest of this turn.
flavorText: "I bet Dad never caught any flowers like this!"
author: Cam Kendell

name: Monterey Jack
subtitle: Watchful Ranger
rulesText: \Bird's-Eye View\ When you play this character, you may reveal the top card of your deck. If it's a character card, you may put it into your hand. Otherwise, put it on the bottom of your deck.
flavorText: “They’re not lost. I just haven’t found ’em yet!”
author: Maria Dresden

name: Woody
subtitle: Waiting for a Friend
flavorText:
"Starin’ over the jungle from this huge vine
I think back to when I was laughin’ and feelin’ fine
My friends were all around to welcome me back home
But now I’m lost in Lorcana and oh so alone"
author: Federico Maria Cugliari

name: Dale
subtitle: Excited Friend
rulesText: \Look What I Found\ While you have a character named Chip in play, this character gets +1 {L}.
flavorText: "Hey, Chip! Look what I found! Maybe we can use ’em for something."
author: Alina Beserman

name: Pedro Madrigal
subtitle: Family Patriarch
rulesText:
\Difficult Journey\ This character enters play with 1 damage.

\Devoted Family\ When you play this character, if you have another Madrigal character in play, you may remove up to 1 damage from him.
author: Hania Czyżewska

name: Agustin Madrigal
subtitle: Exceptionally Kind
rulesText: <Support> (Whenever this character quests, you may add their {S} to another chosen character's {S} this turn.)
flavorText: "I'm happy to bring these arepas to the oasis, mi vida. Just think how much more I could help if I had a gift."
author: Gaku Kumatori

name: Alan-a-Dale
subtitle: Loyal Bard
rulesText: <Singer> 4 (This character counts as cost 4 to sing songs.)
flavorText:
"When the vine was loomin' large
And had us all feelin' down
Ol' Martin stood up, took charge
And now we're Illuminary bound"
author: Billy Martin

name: Prince Eric
subtitle: Noble Swordsman
flavorText: Of all the items in Ariel's trove, something about this particular sword called to him. He knew it was meant to be his.
author: Marta Andreeva

name: Dolores Madrigal
subtitle: Hears Everything
rulesText: \No Secrets\ When you play this character, look at chosen opponent's hand.
flavorText: "Amazu says he'll be back this way in a few weeks. He's stuck in the desert right now."
author: Valerio Buonfantino

name: Rex
subtitle: Protective Dinosaur
rulesText:
<Bodyguard> (This character may enter play exerted. An opposing character who challenges one of your characters must choose one with Bodyguard if able.)

\Run Away!\ During an opponent's turn, when this character is banished, gain 1 lore.
author: Malia Ewart

name: Hamm
subtitle: Piggy Bank
rulesText: \Loose Change\ {E} — You pay 1 {I} less for the next character you play this turn.
flavorText: “Can you hurry up, Woody? I think these flowers are aiming to break the bank, if you know what I mean!”
author: Emily Abeydeera

name: Monterey Jack
subtitle: Hypnotized by Cheese
rulesText: \Break the Trance\ This character can't quest unless you have a character with 4 {W} or more in play.
flavorText: "When there’s a hint of cheddar in the air, somethin’ inside me snaps."
author: Diego Machuca

name: Bo Peep
subtitle: Caring Shepherd
rulesText: \Somebody Do Something!\ Your characters named Woody gain <Bodyguard>. (An opposing character who challenges one of your characters must choose one with Bodyguard if able.)
author: Hyuna Lee

name: Chip
subtitle: Retrieval Expert
rulesText:
\There You Are!\ When you play this character, you may return a character card with 4 {W} or more from your discard to your hand.

\Friendly Assist\ Your characters named Dale get +1 {W}.
author: Rodrigo Raposo

name: Woody
subtitle: Jungle Guide
rulesText:
<Shift> 3 {I} (You may pay 3 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Woody.)

\Let's Get Movin'\ Whenever this character quests, draw a card. Then, you may play a character with cost 2 or less for free.

\Everyone Gather 'Round\ Your other Toy characters get +1 {W}.
author: Jochem van Gool

name: Isabela Madrigal
subtitle: Such a Lovely Voice
rulesText:
<Singer> 5 (This character counts as cost 5 to sing songs.)

\New Motif\ When you play this character, if you removed 1 or more damage from one of your characters this turn, gain 1 lore.
author: Lynn's Magic Worlds

name: Bullseye
subtitle: Loyal Horse
rulesText: \Let's Ride\ If you have a character named Woody or Jessie in play, you pay 1 {I} less to play this character.
flavorText:
"Whoo-whee, Bullseye! You're muddier than a pig at suppertime! Now come on outta there."
—Jessie
author: Gaku Kumatori

name: Ariel
subtitle: Curious Traveler
rulesText: \Familiar Ground\ Whenever this character quests, if you played another character this turn, chosen opposing character can't challenge and must quest during their next turn if able.
flavorText: "Isn't it wonderful? See if there's anything that catches your eye."
author: Clio Schaffner

name: Isabela Madrigal
subtitle: Caring Cultivator
rulesText:
<Shift> 4 {I} (You may pay 4 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Isabela Madrigal.)

\Do No Wrong\ Whenever you remove damage from one of your characters, gain 1 lore for each 1 damage removed.
author: LadyShalirin

name: Jessie
subtitle: Lively Cowgirl
rulesText:
\Part of a Family\ Whenever this character quests, if you have 2 or more other Toy characters in play, you may draw a card.

\Yodel-ay-hee-hoo!\ Whenever you pay 2 {I} or less to play a card, chosen opposing character gets -1 {S} until the start of your next turn.
author: Gaku Kumatori

name: Woody
subtitle: Leader of the Toys
rulesText: \Let's Go Home\ When you play this character, look at the top 4 cards of your deck. You may reveal a Toy character card or a location card named Andy's Room and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.
author: Max Ulichney

name: Dale
subtitle: Ready for His Shot
rulesText: \Spike Suit\ During challenges, your characters deal damage with their {W} instead of their {S}.
flavorText:
“He’s bonkus in the conkus, you know.”
—Monterey Jack
author: Cam Kendell

name: The Prince
subtitle: Searching for His Love
flavorText: “Forest deep and highest mountain are nothing to a true heart. I hear my love’s voice in every bird’s song and see her beauty in the golden light.”
author: Julie Vu

name: Julieta Madrigal
subtitle: Caring Baker
rulesText: \Restoring Recipe\ When you play this character and whenever she quests, you may remove up to 1 damage from chosen character or location.
flavorText: "Mi amor, your kind heart is the best gift I've ever received."
author: Gaku Kumatori

name: Pluto
subtitle: Vigilant Traveler
rulesText: \Beware of Dog\ Whenever this character quests, if you played another character this turn, chosen opposing character gets -1 {S} until the start of your next turn.
flavorText:
“What’d you hear, boy?”
—Mickey
author: Koni

name: Mickey Mouse
subtitle: Expedition Leader
rulesText:
\Long Journey\ This character may enter play exerted.

\Secret Path\ While this character is exerted, whenever one of your other characters quests, chosen opposing character gets -2 {S} until the start of your next turn.
author: Lisanne Koeteeuw

name: Chip
subtitle: Team Player
rulesText: \Ranger Resourcefulness\ When you play this character, if you have another character with 4 {W} or more in play, you may draw a card.
flavorText: "Come on, Dale. You look fine! I've got a plan that you'll be perfect for!"
author: Cam Kendell

name: Ranger Team-Up
rulesText: Chosen character gets +{S} equal to their {W} this turn.
flavorText:
“Great teamwork, pal! Now, make sure that helmet is fastened nice and tight . . .”
—Chip
author: Hedvig H-S

name: This Growing Pressure
rulesText:
(A character with cost 3 or more can {E} to sing this song for free.) 

Chosen opposing character can't challenge and must quest during their next turn if able. Draw a card.
author: Diogo Saito

name: You've Got a Friend in Me
rulesText:
(A character with cost 3 or more can {E} to sing this song for free.) 

Look at the top 4 cards of your deck. You may reveal up to 2 Toy character cards and put them into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.
author: Natalie Dombois

name: Metamorphosis
rulesText: Shift a character from your discard for free.
flavorText:
"The vine is full of flood ink. You won't believe what it can do with a little encouragement!"
—Isabela Madrigal
author: Emily Abeydeera

name: When You Need Help, Just Call
rulesText:
(A character with cost 3 or more can {E} to sing this song for free.) 

If an opponent has more characters in play than you, you may play a character with cost 4 or less for free.
author: Carmine Pucci

name: Safety Rope
rulesText:
\Grab Hold!\ When you play this item, you may put a character card from your discard on the top of your deck.

\Pack It Up\ At the end of your turn, you may banish this item to draw a card.
author: Leonardo Giammichele

name: Andy's Room
subtitle: Home Base
rulesText: \Andy's Favorite\ While you have only 1 character here, they get +2 {W} and +1 {L}.
author: Jiahui Eva Gao

name: Mor'du
subtitle: Wicked with Pride
rulesText: <Rush> (This character can challenge the turn they're played.)
flavorText:
"Believing that he alone should be the sole heir, a seed of selfishness grew in him like a poison."
—The Witch
author: Javi Salas

name: Alma Madrigal
subtitle: Leading the Way
rulesText: \Protecting the Family\ When you play this character, if you have another Madrigal character in play, you may exert chosen opposing character.
flavorText: "In our darkest moment, we were given a miracle."
author: LadyShalirin

name: Snow White
subtitle: Merry as the Morning
rulesText:
\Clarion Call\ Whenever this character quests, you may return chosen Seven Dwarfs character of yours to your hand to draw a card.

\Never Forgotten\ During an opponent's turn, when this character is banished in a challenge, return this card to your hand.
author: Juan Diego León

name: Dopey
subtitle: Drawn to Music
rulesText:
\Tongue-Tied\ This character can't {E} to sing songs.

\Distant Melody\ Once during your turn, whenever you play a song, this character gets +1 {L} this turn.
author: Juan Diego León

name: Bashful
subtitle: Riding the Rails
rulesText: <Evasive> (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)
flavorText: "Oh, gosh!"
author: Juan Diego León

name: Doc
subtitle: Taking Notes
rulesText: \Share Knowledge\ When you play this character, if you have another Seven Dwarfs character or a Princess character in play, draw a card.
flavorText: "Oh boy! Now this is a change grant . . . uh, a ranged pant . . . a strange plant!"
author: Juan Diego León

name: Grumpy
subtitle: Soreheaded Miner
flavorText: "Watch what yer doin'. Ya nearly put me through a wall with that sneeze! Ya wanna bring the whole mine down?!"
author: Juan Diego León

name: Sneezy
subtitle: Startlingly Loud
rulesText: \Gesundheit\ When you play this character, chosen character gets +1 {L} this turn.
flavorText: "Why did the vine have to have such big flo—ah-AH-CHOO!"
author: Juan Diego León

name: Happy
subtitle: Joyful Adventurer
flavorText: "This vine looks mighty peculiar! You fellas think it'd be okay to touch it?"
author: Juan Diego León

name: Sleepy
subtitle: Deep Sleeper
rulesText: \Pleasant Dreams\ When this character is banished, if you have a Seven Dwarfs or Princess character in play, you may draw a card.
flavorText: A warm breeze, fragrant smells, and a gently swinging vine . . . Who <wouldn't> fall asleep?
author: Juan Diego León

name: Alma Madrigal
subtitle: Heart of the Family
rulesText: \Find a Way\ Whenever this character quests, move up to 1 damage from chosen character of yours to chosen opposing character.
flavorText: “Everybody makes mistakes. What’s important is that we recognize them.”
author: Magenta Muraca

name: Frozone
subtitle: Super Slick
rulesText: <Evasive> (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)
flavorText: “Go on. You can say it. That was cool, right?”
author: Hyuna Lee

name: Will o' the Wisp
subtitle: Forest Spirit
rulesText: \Come On Out\ When this character is banished in a challenge, you may return this card to your hand.
flavorText: They always come back when you need them.
author: Giulia Riva

name: Violet Parr
subtitle: Learning New Powers
rulesText:
<Evasive> (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)

\Deflect\ When you play this character, you may move 1 damage from chosen character to chosen opposing character.
author: Cristian Romero

name: Mrs. Incredible
subtitle: Super Stretchy
rulesText:
\Flexible Thinking\ At the start of your turn, you may choose one:
• This character gains <Evasive> until the start of your next turn. (Only characters with Evasive can challenge them.)
• This character gets +1 {L} this turn.
author: Max Grecke

name: Hamish, Hubert & Harris
subtitle: Making Mischief
rulesText:
\Stay Quiet\ This character may enter play exerted.

\Clever Trap\ At the end of your turn, if this character is exerted, chosen opposing character can't ready at the start of their next turn.
author: Ellie Horie

name: Elinor
subtitle: Bespelled Queen
rulesText: <Challenger> +2 (While challenging, this character gets +2 {S}.)
flavorText: She had a lot to learn about being a bear, but protecting her family came naturally.
author: Ian MacDonald

name: Mickey Mouse
subtitle: Experienced Traveler
rulesText: \Lighting the Way\ Whenever this character quests, if you played another character this turn, you may draw a card.
flavorText: You're never lost when you have a friend by your side.
author: Koni

name: Mirage
subtitle: Super Recruiter
rulesText: \Business Arrangement\ When you play this character, if you have a Super or Hero character in play, you may draw a card.
flavorText: “The Supers aren’t gone, Mr. Incredible. You’re still here. You can still do great things.”
author: LadyShalirin

name: Edna Mode
subtitle: Fashion Designer
rulesText:
\No Capes!\ When you play this character, you may return chosen item with cost 2 or less to its player's hand. If you do, its player draws a card.

\Making Supers Fabulous\ Whenever this character quests, your Super characters get +1 {L} this turn.
author: Stefano Spagnuolo

name: Maleficent
subtitle: Imperious Traveler
rulesText: \Heed My Words\ Whenever this character quests, if you played another character this turn, you may exert chosen opposing character.
flavorText: “Bind this glimmer, fiendish flowers!"
author: Gaku Kumatori

name: Pepa Madrigal
subtitle: Calm Before the Storm
rulesText:
\Stormy Weather\ When you play this character, deal 1 damage to each of your other characters.

\Silver Lining\ Once during your turn, whenever you remove 1 or more damage from one of your characters, draw a card.
author: Marcin Karolewski

name: Mor'du
subtitle: Savage Cursed Prince
rulesText:
\Ferocious Roar\ When you play this character, exert all your characters not named Mor'du.

\Rooted by Fear\ Your characters not named Mor'du can't ready at the start of your turn.
author: Isaiah Mesq

name: Alma Madrigal
subtitle: Keeper of the Flame
rulesText:
<Shift> 3 {I} (You may pay 3 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Alma Madrigal.)

\That's Enough\ Whenever you remove 1 or more damage from one of your characters, you may exert chosen opposing character.
author: LadyShalirin

name: Frozone
subtitle: Super Cool
rulesText:
<Rush> (This character can challenge the turn they're played.)

\Just Chill\ When you play this character, if you have another Super character in play, you may exert chosen opposing character.
author: Juan Diego León

name: Luisa Madrigal
subtitle: Confident Climber
rulesText:
<Shift> 3 {I} (You may pay 3 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Luisa Madrigal.)

\I Can Take It\ 1 {I} — Move up to 1 damage from chosen character of yours to this character. Then, if this character has 3 or more damage, move all damage from this character to chosen opposing character.
author: Malia Ewart

name: Dash Parr
subtitle: Lava Runner
rulesText:
<Rush> (This character can challenge the turn they're played.)

\Record Time\ This character can quest the turn he's played.
flavorText: "Whoa! A hidden place inside the mountain!"
author: Randy Bishop

name: Luisa Madrigal
subtitle: Pushing Through
rulesText: <Challenger> +2 (While challenging, this character gets +2 {S}.)
flavorText: "One way . . . or another . . . I'm getting . . . all of you . . . up . . . this mountain!"
author: Natalia Trykowska

name: Super Relocation Program
rulesText: Return chosen character of yours to your hand. If you returned a Hero character this way, draw 2 cards.
flavorText:
“We appreciate what you did in the old days, but those days are over.”
—Rick Dicker
author: Milica Celikovic

name: Right Behind You
rulesText: Draw a card. If you have a Seven Dwarfs character and a Princess character in play, you may play a Seven Dwarfs character for free.
author: Ellie Horie

name: Don't Be Nervous
rulesText: Search your deck for a Princess character card, reveal that card to all players, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck. If you have 2 or more Seven Dwarfs characters in play, draw 2 cards and gain 2 lore.
author: Emily Abeydeera

name: Super Suit
rulesText:
\Simple, Elegant\ When you play this item, if you have a Hero character in play, gain 1 lore.

\Suit Up\ {E}, 2 {I} — If you played a Hero character this turn, draw a card.
author: Javi Salas

name: DunBroch Family Tapestry
rulesText:
\Torn Apart\ This item enters play exerted.

\Mend the Bond\ {E}, Banish this item — Each player shuffles all character cards from their discard into their deck.
author: Jiahui Eva Gao

name: Ring of Stones
subtitle: Place of Legends
rulesText:
\Follow Your Fate\ Your exerted characters can move here for free.

\Part the Veil\ Once during your turn, whenever a character moves here, gain 1 lore.
author: Javi Salas

name: Merida
subtitle: Defiant Daughter
rulesText: <Ward> (Opponents can't choose this character except to challenge.)
flavorText: "'Stay in camp, Merida.' 'Be an example, Merida.' What could it hurt to go out and explore? I'll stay on the vine and they'll never even know."
author: Kenneth Anderson

name: Hamish, Hubert & Harris
subtitle: Troublemaking Triplets
rulesText: <Evasive> (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)
flavorText:
"Oh, aye, they're slippery little devils. Ye should see what they did to the garden."
—Merida
author: Lisanne Koeteeuw

name: Young MacGuffin
subtitle: Soft-Spoken Son
flavorText: "There's something <wrong> with these flowers, Da. They make me feel funny, like I dinnae want to fight them."
author: Brian Kesinger

name: Tod
subtitle: Nimble Fox
rulesText: <Evasive> (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)
flavorText: "Look, I counted to ten before I started climbing. You all should have found better hiding spots than the top of a tree."
author: Saulo Nate

name: Helga Sinclair
subtitle: No Backup Needed
rulesText: \Crisis Management\ If 2 or more cards were put into your discard this turn, you pay 2 {I} less to play this character.
flavorText: "Once again, I find myself cleaning up someone else's mess."
author: Magenta Muraca / Grace Tran

name: The Witch
subtitle: Wily Woodcarver
rulesText: \Unsatisfied Customers\ Whenever this character is challenged, each opponent loses 1 lore.
flavorText: "This is the perfect place to set up shop! That vine adds just the right rustic feel."
author: Ellie Horie

name: The Queen
subtitle: Evil Ruler
rulesText: \Unequaled Cruelty\ While an opposing damaged character is in play, this character gets +2 {S}.
flavorText: “With such a gift to further the Council’s goals, soon all will tremble before my power.”
author: Lara Carson

name: Buzz Lightyear
subtitle: Space Ranger
flavorText: “Environment appears habitable, but the flora seems to have undergone some strange mutations. Could be Zurg's influence."
author: Juan Diego León

name: RC
subtitle: Remote-Controlled Car
rulesText: \Low Batteries\ This character can't quest or challenge unless you pay 1 {I}. (You pay this cost each time.)
flavorText: Racing around Andy's room is fun, but he <really> loves going off road.
author: Isaiah Mesq

name: Lord MacGuffin
subtitle: Clever Swordsman
rulesText: \Wait for It . . .\ This character may enter play exerted to deal 3 damage to chosen damaged character.
flavorText: "We'll find our way back to the Illuminary if we have to fight through every plant in Lorcana."
author: Brian Kesinger

name: Lenny
subtitle: Toy Binoculars
rulesText:
\Take a Good Look\ When you play this character, chosen opponent reveals their hand and discards an action card of your choice.

\Comin' Up Fast\ Once during your turn, whenever you play an action, you may ready this character.
author: Jiahui Eva Gao

name: Gaetan Moliere
subtitle: Clever Burrower
rulesText:
<Evasive> (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)

\Unearth\ Whenever this character quests, you may draw 2 cards, then choose and discard 2 cards.
author: Lorena Piloreta

name: Peter Pan
subtitle: Searching Far and Wide
flavorText: "I've already checked the whole jungle. He's got to be around here somewhere!"
author: Andrea Femerstrand

name: Milo Thatch
subtitle: Getting His Hands Dirty
rulesText:
<Ward>

\Scholar's Gambit\ When you play this character, you may choose and discard a card to return chosen character to their player's hand.

\Practical Knowledge\ At the end of your turn, if 2 or more cards were put into your discard this turn, draw a card.
author: John Loren

name: Alien
subtitle: True Believer
rulesText:
\We Are One\ This character gets +1 {S} for each other Toy character you have in play.

\He Has Been Chosen\ During your turn, when this character is banished, return another character card named Alien from your discard to your hand.
author: Cristian Romero

name: Donald Duck
subtitle: Distracted Traveler
rulesText: \Burning Curiosity\ Whenever this character quests, if you played another character this turn, each opponent chooses and discards a card.
flavorText: In the wilderness of Lorcana, a little luck goes a long way.
author: Kenneth Anderson

name: Buzz Lightyear
subtitle: On the Way
rulesText:
\Secret Mission\ Whenever you pay 2 {I} or less to play a non-character, draw a card, then choose and discard a card.

\World's Greatest Toy\ Whenever you pay 2 {I} or less to play a character, deal 1 damage to chosen opposing damaged character.
author: Max Grecke

name: Elinor
subtitle: Renowned Diplomat
rulesText: \Coordinated Efforts\ At the end of your turn, if you have 3 or more exerted characters in play, deal 1 damage to chosen opposing character, gain 1 lore, and draw a card.
author: César Vergara

name: Lyle Tiberius Rourke
subtitle: Adventurer for Hire
rulesText:
\Eye for Value\ When you play this character, you may draw a card, then choose and discard a card.

\Dirty Tricks\ At the end of your turn, if 2 or more cards were put into your discard this turn, each opponent loses 1 lore.
author: Sytze Brommersma

name: Joshua Sweet
subtitle: Field Surgeon
rulesText: \No Patience\ Whenever this character is challenged, chosen opponent chooses and discards a card.
flavorText: "It's barely a scratch! Get some rest and you'll be fine. No arguing—doctor's orders."
author: French Carlomagno

name: Merida
subtitle: Gifted Archer
rulesText:
<Shift> 3 {I} (You may pay 3 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Merida.)

\Fierce Protection\ While this character is exerted, whenever an opposing character challenges, you may deal 1 damage to the challenging character.
author: LadyShalirin

name: The Queen
subtitle: Devious Disguise
rulesText:
\Evil Scheme\ When you play this character, you may draw a card. If you do, each opponent gains 2 lore.

\Jealous Heart\ While an opponent has more lore than you, this character gets +2 {L}.
author: Eri Welli

name: Buzz Lightyear
subtitle: Jungle Ranger
rulesText:
<Shift> 5 {I} (You may pay 5 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Buzz Lightyear.)

\Take Charge\ When you play this character, you may return an action card with cost 7 or less from your discard to your hand.

\Advanced Training\ Whenever you play an action, chosen character gets +1 {L} this turn.
author: Koni

name: Cruella De Vil
subtitle: Judgmental Traveler
rulesText: \You're Out of Fashion\ Whenever this character quests, if you played another character this turn, you may banish chosen damaged character.
flavorText: "Can I help you? Not with <your> sense of style, darling."
author: Koni

name: Helga Sinclair
subtitle: Prepared for Anything
rulesText: \Combat Training\ Whenever this character quests, deal 1 damage to chosen opposing character. If 2 or more cards were put into your discard this turn, deal 2 damage instead.
flavorText: She'll take on anything for the right price.
author: Magenta Muraca

name: The Huntsman
subtitle: On the Queen's Orders
rulesText: <Ward> (Opponents can't choose this character except to challenge.)
flavorText:
“Even you wouldn’t be fool enough to disobey my orders a second time.”
—The Queen
author: Lorenza Pigliamosche

name: Strange Things
rulesText:
(A character with cost 4 or more can {E} to sing this song for free.) 

Up to 2 chosen characters can't quest until the start of your next turn. Draw a card.
author: Emily Abeydeera

name: Sabotage
rulesText: Banish chosen item or location and all other items or locations with the same name.
flavorText: "Ha! That worked even better than last time."
author: Wouter Bruneel

name: The Family Scattered
rulesText: Chosen opponent chooses 3 of their characters and returns one of those cards to their hand, puts one on the bottom of their deck, and puts one on the top of their deck.
author: Diogo Saito

name: Buzz's Arm
rulesText:
\Missing Piece\ If a character named Buzz Lightyear was banished this turn, you may play this item for free.

\Some Assembly Required\ {E} — You pay 1 {I} less for the next action or item you play this turn.
author: Juan Diego León

name: The Claw
rulesText: \The Claw Chooses\ {E}, 2 {I}, Banish one of your characters — Return chosen opposing character to their player's hand.
flavorText:
“Trust in the Claw. It shall lift us from this terrible place!” 
—Alien
author: Ricardo Caria

name: Gyro-Evac
rulesText:
\Take Her Up\ {E}, 1 {I} — Chosen character of yours gains <Evasive> until the start of your next turn. (Only characters with Evasive can challenge them.)

\Crash Landing\ {E}, Banish this item — Each player loses 2 lore.
author: Valerio Buonfantino

name: Merida's Bow
rulesText:
\Easy Shot\ When you play this item, deal 1 damage to chosen character.

\Final Arrow\ 1 {I}, Banish this item — Deal 1 damage to chosen character.
author: Aurélie Lise-Anne

name: Pizza Planet
subtitle: Spaceport
rulesText:
\You Are Clear to Enter\ Your Toy characters can move here for free.

\Heavily Guarded\ Whenever a character is challenged while here, each opponent loses 1 lore.
author: Wietse Treurniet

name: Lyle Tiberius Rourke
subtitle: Crystallized Commander
rulesText:
<Shift> 4 {I} (You may pay 4 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Lyle Tiberius Rourke.)

\Plan's Changed\ When you play this character, put the top 2 cards of your deck into your discard. Then, you may return an action card with cost 4 or less from your discard to your hand.
author: Max Grecke

name: Mr. Incredible
subtitle: Bob Parr
flavorText: Dropping weight and getting in shape!
author: Alex Accorsi / Grace Tran

name: Lyle Tiberius Rourke
subtitle: Looking for His Moment
flavorText: "You have to be ready to take advantage of any opportunity. And this vine? Looks like a pretty big opportunity."
author: Mike Parker

name: Pegasus
subtitle: Searching High and Low
rulesText: <Evasive> (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)
flavorText: Lorcana had changed. It felt <bigger> somehow. But no matter how big it got, he was determined to find his friend.
author: Andrea Femerstrand

name: Audrey Ramirez
subtitle: Gutsy Mechanic
rulesText: <Rush> (This character can challenge the turn they're played.)
flavorText: "I love a machine that gets me in the action even faster!"
author: Olga Andriyenko

name: Milo Thatch
subtitle: Courageous Explorer
rulesText: \Fascinating Discovery\ During your turn, if 2 or more cards were put into your discard this turn, this character gets +1 {L}.
flavorText: “Just think, Amazu—without the vine, we might never have discovered these ruins!"
author: Brian Kesinger

name: Zeus
subtitle: Defiant God
rulesText: \Immortal Wound\ This character enters play with 4 damage.
flavorText: “I am the ruler of Olympus! I refuse to be defeated by a bunch of <flowers>!”
author: Alex Accorsi

name: Preston Whitmore
subtitle: Expedition Financier
rulesText: \Price of Progress\ When you play this character, you may put the top 2 cards of your deck into your discard.
flavorText: "I promised all of you I'd keep your secrets. And Preston Whitmore <always> keeps a promise."
author: French Carlomagno

name: Jingle Joe
subtitle: Sid's Toy
rulesText: \Turn Out the Light\ During your turn, whenever one of your other Toy characters is banished, chosen character of yours gains <Evasive> until the start of your next turn. (Only characters with Evasive can challenge them.)
author: Randy Bishop

name: Wind-Up Frog
subtitle: Sid's Toy
rulesText: \Added Traction\ If one of your Toy characters was banished this turn, you pay 2 {I} less to play this character.
flavorText:
"I made it cooler. Who cares about some dumb hopping frog, when it can have wheels?"
—Sid
author: Javi Salas

name: Roller Bob
subtitle: Sid's Toy
rulesText: \Time to Move\ When you play this character, you may put 2 character cards from your discard on the bottom of your deck to give this character <Rush> this turn. (They can challenge the turn they're played.)
author: Luca Pinelli

name: Hand-in-the-Box
subtitle: Sid's Toy
rulesText: \Spring-Loaded\ You may put a Toy character card from your discard on the bottom of your deck to play this character for free.
flavorText:
“Ah! How does that still startle me every time?”
—Woody
author: Jeremy Adams

name: Daisy Duck
subtitle: Trendy Traveler
rulesText: \Break Is Over\ Whenever this character quests, if you played a character this turn, you may ready another chosen character. If you do, they can't quest for the rest of this turn.
flavorText: “Time to go. I don’t want to miss that sunset!”
author: Clio Schaffner

name: Copper
subtitle: Big Dog
flavorText: "I'll clear this ol' vine out, if I have to do it one root at a time."
author: Saulo Nate

name: Jebidiah Farnsworth
subtitle: Cookie
rulesText:
<Evasive> (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)

<Reckless> (This character can't quest and must challenge each turn if able.)
flavorText: "<Anything's> edible if ya fry it!"
author: Isaiah Mesq

name: Dash Parr
subtitle: Super Speedy
rulesText: <Rush> (This character can challenge the turn they're played.)
flavorText:
"You can’t outrun your chores, young man!”
—Helen Parr
author: LadyShalirin

name: Babyhead
subtitle: Leader of Sid's Toys
rulesText:
\Tighten the Bolts\ Whenever you pay 2 {I} or less to play a card, chosen character gets +2 {S} this turn.

\Replacement Parts\ During your turn, whenever one of your other characters is banished, draw a card.
author: Maor Sharvit

name: Bouncing Ducky
subtitle: Sid's Toy
rulesText:
\Rejected Toys\ For each Toy character card in your discard, you pay 1 {I} less to play this character.

\Repurposed\ When you play this character, put all Toy character cards from your discard on the bottom of your deck in any order.
author: Jiahui Eva Gao

name: Jack-Jack Parr
subtitle: Incredible Potential
rulesText:
\Weird Things Are Happening\ At the start of your turn, you may put the top card of your deck into your discard. If its card type is:
• character, this character gets +2 {S} this turn.
• action or item, this character gets +2 {L} this turn.
• location, banish chosen character.
author: Lisanne Koeteeuw

name: Queen of Hearts
subtitle: Impatient Traveler
rulesText: \Royal Command\ Whenever this character quests, if you played another character this turn, chosen character gains <Rush> this turn. (They can challenge the turn they're played.)
flavorText: Hours of walking in the heat had not improved her rosy disposition.
author: Magenta Muraca

name: Hercules
subtitle: Young Rescuer
rulesText: \Heroic Sacrifice\ When you play this character, you may discard your hand. If you do, return a card from your discard to your hand.
flavorText: “I don’t care what the Fates say. I make my own destiny.”
author: Alex Accorsi

name: Vincenzo Santorini
subtitle: On the Run
rulesText:
<Evasive> (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)

\Neutralize\ Opposing items can't ready at the start of their players' turns.
author: Wouter Bruneel

name: The Leviathan
subtitle: Guardian of Atlantis
rulesText: \It's A Machine!\ When you play this character, if 2 or more cards were put into your discard this turn, you may banish any number of chosen opposing characters with total {S} 10 or less.
author: Alberto Besi

name: Sid Phillips
subtitle: Toy Surgeon
rulesText:
\Playtime's Over\ When you play this character, you may banish another chosen character of yours. If you do, each opponent chooses and banishes one of their characters.

\Double Prizes!\ During your turn, whenever a Toy character is banished, gain 2 lore.
author: Juan Diego León

name: Mr. Incredible
subtitle: Super Strong
rulesText:
<Shift> 3 {I} (You may pay 3 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Mr. Incredible.)

\Always United\ This character gets +2 {S} for each other character you have in play.

\Let's Do This!\ Whenever one of your Super characters challenges another character, draw a card.
author: Hyuna Lee

name: Pterodactyl Janie Doll
subtitle: Sid's Toy
rulesText: \Double Transplant\ During your turn, when this character is banished, each opponent loses 1 lore and you gain 1 lore.
flavorText:
"The first step of her transformation is complete."
—Sid
author: Isaiah Mesq

name: Inner Strength
rulesText: Chosen character gets +1 {S} this turn. Draw a card.
flavorText: Just when you think you've given it all you've got, sometimes you can give a little more.
author: Mike Parker

name: Firefly Swarm
rulesText:
Choose one:
• Banish chosen character with 2 {S} or less.
• If 2 or more other cards were put into your discard this turn, banish chosen character.
author: Alex Accorsi

name: Like A Bird In the Sky
rulesText:
(A character with cost 2 or more can {E} to sing this song for free.) 

Chosen character gets +1 {L} and gains <Evasive> until the start of your next turn. (Only characters with Evasive can challenge them.)
author: LadyShalirin

name: Hero Work
rulesText: Your characters get +1 {S} this turn. Your Hero characters gain "Whenever this character challenges another character, each opponent loses 1 lore and you gain 1 lore" this turn.
flavorText:
"It's a whole family of Supers!" 
—Syndrome
author: Koni

name: Dangerous Plan
rulesText: Draw 2 cards. Then, discard a card at random.
flavorText:
Audrey: "<This> was your plan?!"
Milo: "I didn't anticipate the flowers, but it can still work!"
author: Omar Lozano

name: Amazu's Inkcaster
rulesText: \On the Horizon\ {E}, 1 {I} — Look at the top 4 cards of your deck. You may reveal a location card and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.
flavorText:
"It always points the way to new adventures."
—Amazu, an Illumineer
author: Kuya Jaypi

name: Remote Inklands
subtitle: Desert Ruins
rulesText:
\Eroding Winds\ At the start of your turn, put the top card of your deck into your discard.

\Successful Expedition\ Characters get +2 {S} while here.
author: Nicolas Ky

name: Leviathan's Lair
subtitle: Dangerous Ground
rulesText: \Lost to the Dunes\ When this location is banished, each opponent chooses and banishes one of their characters.
flavorText: Enter the lair of the leviathan.
author: Nicolas Ky

name: Robin Hood
subtitle: Desert Wanderer
flavorText: "I say, those glowing symbols look interesting. I think it's time to go in for a closer look!"
author: Kevin Slawinski

name: Prince Charming
subtitle: Searching for Answers
flavorText: From a distance this had looked like any other cave. But up close . . .
author: Carina 'Scyrina' Heller

name: Merryweather
subtitle: Feisty Fairy
rulesText: <Ward> (Opponents can't choose this character except to challenge.)
flavorText: "We'll need a fire! A nice <blue> fire, of course."
author: Federico Maria Cugliari

name: Fauna
subtitle: Good-Natured Fairy
rulesText: <Support> (Whenever this character quests, you may add their {S} to another chosen character's {S} this turn.)
flavorText: "Oh dear, let me help you with that.”
author: Federico Maria Cugliari

name: Flora
subtitle: Strong-Willed Fairy
rulesText: \Luminous Shelter\ When you play this character, your other characters gain <Resist> +1 until the start of your next turn. (Damage dealt to them is reduced by 1.)
flavorText: "While you two finish up, I'll add protective charms. Pink, of course."
author: Federico Maria Cugliari

name: Mirabel Madrigal
subtitle: Resourceful Daughter
rulesText: \This Will Help\ When you play this character, remove up to 2 damage from chosen character.
flavorText: “We'll get you something to eat when we get to camp. For now, you should drink this.”
author: Milica Celikovic

name: Syndrome
subtitle: Evil Inventor
rulesText: <Alert> (This character can challenge as if they had Evasive.)
flavorText: The fifth Rule of Villainy: The best way to get revenge on your enemies? Lots of practice.
author: Cristian Romero

name: Kida
subtitle: Guardian of the Path
rulesText: \Natural Defense\ When you play this character, chosen opposing character gets -2 {S} this turn.
flavorText:
"I may be far from home, but I still know how to snare an intruder."
—Kida
author: Tim van Galen

name: Gadget Hackwrench
subtitle: Resourceful Mechanic
rulesText:
\Time to Tinker\ When you play this character, you may play an item with cost 3 or less for free.

\Well Supplied\ Your characters with <Support> get +1 {L}.
author: Max Ulichney

name: Norton Nimnul
subtitle: Misanthropic Genius
rulesText: \Devitalizer Ray\ Once during your turn, whenever you play an item, chosen opposing character gets -2 {S} this turn.
flavorText: "Another successful test! This brilliant devitalizer ray technology will be my finest invention yet!"
author: Marco Giorgianni / Livio Cacciatore

name: Gadget Hackwrench
subtitle: Finder of Lost Parts
rulesText: \Useful Bits\ When this character leaves play, you may return an item card from your discard to your hand.
flavorText: "Golly, I can't believe I almost left the safety pin behind. It's the key to everything!"
author: Maria Dresden / Ellie Horie

name: Zipper
subtitle: Tiny Helper
flavorText:
"Crikey! I've seen fellas who are twice the size with half the heart as that wee dodger!"
—Monterey Jack
author: Natalie Dombois

name: Edna Mode
subtitle: Super Suit Designer
rulesText:
\Key Accessory\ {E} — Ready chosen item.

\All the Basics\ While you have an item named Super Suit in play, this character gains <Ward>. (Opponents can't choose them except to challenge.)
author: Koni

name: Zipper
subtitle: Big Helper
rulesText:
<Shift> 2 {I} (You may pay 2 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Zipper.)

\Buzzing Enthusiasm\ Whenever this character quests, you may add his {W} to another chosen character's {S} this turn.
author: Max Ulichney

name: Luisa Madrigal
subtitle: No Pressure
rulesText: \Shoulder the Burden\ Whenever this character quests, you may move up to 3 damage from chosen character to this character.
flavorText: "Who needs a break? I'm fine! I got this!"
author: Malia Ewart

name: Dr. Sara Bellum
subtitle: Head of Research
rulesText: \Scientific Scrutiny\ When you play this character, look at the top card of your deck. Put it on either the top or the bottom of your deck.
flavorText: "Fascinating. What unusual markings! I can't wait to bring my findings back to S.H.U.S.H."
author: Valentina Graziuso / Grace Tran

name: Isabela Madrigal
subtitle: Perfectly in Control
rulesText:
\Feel Better\ When you play this character and whenever she quests, you may move all damage from chosen character of yours to this character.

\Self-Care\ At the end of your turn, you may remove all damage from this character.
author: Malia Ewart

name: Bruno Madrigal
subtitle: Oasis Oracle
rulesText:
\Find That Vision\ Once during your turn, whenever you remove damage from one of your characters, you may look at the top 2 cards of your deck. Put one into your hand and the other on the bottom of your deck.

\You'll Be Okay\ Whenever this character quests, you may remove all damage from chosen character.
author: Cristian Romero

name: Cinderella
subtitle: Resourceful Traveler
rulesText: \This and That\ Whenever this character quests, if you played another character this turn, you may put the top card of your deck into your inkwell facedown and exerted.
flavorText: No matter how difficult the journey, she always takes care of her friends.
author: Malia Ewart

name: Bruno Madrigal
subtitle: Seeing the Future
rulesText: \Change the Outcome\ When you play this character, you may look at the top card of chosen player's deck. Put it on either the top or the bottom of their deck.
flavorText: "It's so hard to make out . . . I think it's something buried deep underground."
author: Alberto Besi

name: Kida
subtitle: Discovering the Unknown
rulesText: \Read the Runes\ Whenever this character quests, if 2 or more cards were put into your discard this turn, you may put the top card of your deck into your inkwell facedown and exerted.
author: Omar Lozano

name: Kashekim
subtitle: Wise King
rulesText: \Strength in Memory\ At the end of your turn, if 2 or more cards were put into your discard this turn, you may put the top card of your deck into your inkwell facedown.
flavorText: "The power here is buried deep in the sands."
author: Mike Parker

name: Minnie Mouse
subtitle: Practical Traveler
rulesText: \Discerning Eye\ Whenever this character quests, if you played another character this turn, gain 1 lore.
flavorText: "I found a shortcut just over the ridge. We'll be at the oasis in no time!"
author: Kasia Brzezinska

name: Kida
subtitle: Crystal Scion
rulesText:
<Shift> 6 {I}

\Flood of Power\ When you play this character, each player may put up to 5 cards from their discard into their inkwell facedown and exerted.

\The Path Revealed\ 7 {I} — Look at the top 2 cards of your deck. Put one into your hand and the other on the bottom of your deck.
author: Kenneth Anderson

name: Ursula
subtitle: Deal Maker
rulesText:
\Quite the Bargain\ When you play this character and whenever she quests, another chosen character gets +1 {L} this turn.

\By the Way\ At the end of your turn, if this character is exerted, put chosen character of yours into your inkwell facedown and exerted.
author: Jared Mathews

name: Someone Will Lose His Head
rulesText:
(A character with cost 3 or more can {E} to sing this song for free.) 

Each opposing character gets -2 {S} this turn.
author: Katya Cyan

name: What Else Can I Do?
rulesText:
(A character with cost 5 or more can {E} to sing this song for free.)

Look at the top 2 cards of your deck. Put one into your hand and the other into your inkwell facedown and exerted. If a character sang this song, your characters gain <Ward> until the start of your next turn. (Opponents can't choose them except to challenge.)
author: Jennifer Park

name: Escape Plan
rulesText:
You can't play this action unless 2 or more cards were put into your discard this turn.

Each player chooses 2 of their characters and puts them into their inkwell facedown and exerted.
author: Jiahui Eva Gao

name: Salvage Operation
rulesText: Return an item card from your discard to your hand. If you have a character with 4 {W} or more in play, gain 1 lore.
flavorText:
"Can you lift the Ranger Plane up a little higher, Zipper? I've just about got it."
—Gadget Hackwrench
author: Gustavo Chinaide

name: Julieta's Arepas
rulesText:
\Flavorful Cure\ At the start of your turn, if you have a Madrigal character in play, remove up to 2 damage from chosen character.

\That Did the Trick\ {E} — If you removed damage from a character this turn, gain 1 lore.
author: Cristian Romero

name: Ranger Plane
rulesText:
\Air Support\ Your characters gain <Support>. (Whenever they quest, you may add their {S} to another chosen character's {S} this turn.)

\Big Lift\ {E} — Chosen character with 10 {S} or more gets +3 {L} this turn.
author: Emily Abeydeera

name: Gadget's Goggles
rulesText: \Enhanced Vision\ {E}, 1 {I} — Look at the top 2 cards of your deck. Put one on the top of your deck and the other on the bottom.
flavorText:
Dale: "Do you see anything, Gadget?"
Gadget: "Yeah, but I wish I didn’t."
author: Bruno Miranda de Freitas

name: Shepherd's Journal
rulesText:
\Margin Notes\ When you play this item, you may look at the top card of your deck. Put it on either the top of your deck or into your discard.

\Key to the Puzzle\ 1 {I}, Banish this item — Return another item card from your discard to your hand.
author: Isabella Ceravolo

name: Casa Madrigal
subtitle: Courtyard
rulesText: \Healing Home\ Whenever a character quests while here, you may remove up to 2 damage from them. Then, you may remove up to 2 damage from this location.
author: Cristian Romero

name: Pocahontas
subtitle: Steadfast Traveler
rulesText: \Wandering Spirit\ Whenever this character quests, if you played another character this turn, return a location card from your discard to your hand.
flavorText:
“Sometimes the right path is not the easiest one.”
—Grandmother Willow
author: Malia Ewart

name: Syndrome
subtitle: Out for Revenge
rulesText:
<Shift> 4 {I} (You may pay 4 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Syndrome.)

\Got Me Monologuing!\ Whenever this character quests, return a Robot character card from your discard to your hand. Then, you may play or shift a Robot character with cost 8 or less for free.
author: Eri Welli

name: Omnidroid
subtitle: V.8
flavorText:
“It’s bigger! It’s badder! Ladies and gentlemen, it’s too much for Mr. Incredible!”
—Syndrome
author: Jeremy Adams

name: Angus
subtitle: Mighty Horse
rulesText: \Dauntless\ When you play this character, chosen character gains <Alert> this turn. (They can challenge as if they had Evasive.)
author: Milica Celikovic

name: Fergus
subtitle: King of DunBroch
rulesText: <Bodyguard> (This character may enter play exerted. An opposing character who challenges one of your characters must choose one with Bodyguard if able.)
flavorText: "Come on then! I'll take ye all on at once!"
author: Ian MacDonald

name: Wee Dingwall
subtitle: Scrappy Lad
rulesText: <Challenger> +2 (While challenging, this character gets +2 {S}.)
flavorText: "No big flower's gonnae block our way, Da. I'll tear it apart with me own hands."
author: Jared Mathews

name: Incrediboy
subtitle: Buddy Pine
rulesText:
\Nerding Out\ When you play this character, if a Hero character is in play, gain 1 lore.

\Spoiler Alert\ This character also counts as being named Syndrome for <Shift>.
flavorText: "Not every superhero has powers, you know."
author: Eri Welli

name: Violet Parr
subtitle: At Wits' End
rulesText: <Alert> (This character can challenge as if they had Evasive.)
flavorText:
"Keep laughing, Dash. It's time to play 'Bowling for Brothers.'"
—Violet
author: Randy Bishop

name: Mrs. Incredible
subtitle: Helen Parr
rulesText: \Pep Talk\ When you play this character, chosen character gains <Challenger> +2 this turn. (They get +2 {S} while challenging.)
flavorText: "You can do this. I believe in you. Now let's show them what we can do!"
author: Randy Bishop

name: Young Macintosh
subtitle: Proud Son
flavorText: "We've got the strength and we've got the swords. What vine could stand against all of that, right Da?"
author: Adam Ford

name: Lord Macintosh
subtitle: Wiry and High-Strung
rulesText: \Tough It Out\ This character may enter play exerted to give chosen character <Resist> +2 until the start of your next turn. (Damage dealt to them is reduced by 2.)
flavorText: "Clan Macintosh fears no flower, vine, or tree. We dinnae mess with shrubs, though."
author: Adam Ford

name: Fat Cat
subtitle: Felonious Feline
rulesText: <Resist> +1 (Damage dealt to this character is reduced by 1.)
flavorText: "I'm afraid your information is out of date, my dear rodent. I know what the glyphs are for, and more importantly . . . how to use them."
author: Grace Tran

name: Rat Capone
subtitle: Rodent Gangster
rulesText: \SHADAAP!\ While this character has no damage, he gets +3 {S}.
flavorText: "Listen here, you no good, dirty cat. We had a deal! Yeah, a deal, see? And you gotta honor it!"
author: Grace Tran

name: Omnidroid
subtitle: V.9
rulesText:
<Shift> 2 {I} (You may pay 2 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Omnidroid.)

\Enemy Detected\ When you play this character, if you used <Shift> to play it, you may deal 2 damage to chosen character.
author: French Carlomagno

name: Mr. Incredible
subtitle: Taking Out the Trash
rulesText: \Ka-Pow!\ When you play this character, you may deal 2 damage to chosen opposing Robot or Villain character.
flavorText:
“Heavyweight problems need heavyweight solutions.”
—Mr. Incredible
author: French Carlomagno

name: Lord Dingwall
subtitle: Bullheaded
rulesText: \Fightin' Talk\ This character may enter play exerted to give chosen character <Challenger> +3 this turn. (They get +3 {S} while challenging.)
flavorText: "Ach, look at the size o' that flower! Let's clear that beastie out before it causes any trouble."
author: Jared Mathews

name: Fat Cat
subtitle: Criminal Businessman
rulesText: \Worthy Investment\ Your locations gain <Resist> +1. (Damage dealt to them is reduced by 1.)
flavorText: “You don’t become the most wanted cat in the realm by playing nice."
author: Eri Welli

name: Maudie
subtitle: Exasperated Nursemaid
rulesText: <Resist> +1 (Damage dealt to this character is reduced by 1.)
flavorText: "I'm here to look after three <bairns>, not three <bears>!"
author: Jeanne Plounevez

name: Goofy
subtitle: Determined Traveler
rulesText: \Falling Rocks\ Whenever this character quests, if you played another character this turn, you may deal 1 damage to chosen character or location.
flavorText: “Gawrsh! Look out below!”
author: Kenneth Anderson

name: Omnidroid
subtitle: V.10
rulesText:
<Shift> 4 {I} (You may pay 4 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Omnidroid.)

\Electro-Armor\ While there's a card under this character, it gains <Resist> +2. (Damage dealt to them is reduced by 2.)
author: Ricardo Caria

name: Merida
subtitle: Formidable Archer
rulesText:
\Full Quiver\ When you play this character, you may return an action card named Three Arrows from your discard to your hand.

\Steady Aim\ Whenever one of your actions deals damage to an opposing character, deal 2 damage to that character.
author: Max Ulichney

name: John Smith
subtitle: Skillful Explorer
flavorText: "Look alive, men. There's plenty of fish in this river!"
author: Julie Vu

name: Gizmoduck
subtitle: Duckburg Defender
rulesText:
<Resist> +1 (Damage dealt to this character is reduced by 1.)

\Fail-Safe\ While you have no cards in your hand, opponents can't play actions with cost 4 or more.
author: Leonardo Giammichele

name: Fergus
subtitle: Outpost Builder
rulesText:
\Just the Spot\ During your turn, whenever this character becomes exerted, you may play a location from your hand or discard with cost 4 or less for free.

\Hold Fast\ While this character is at a location, whenever a location is challenged and banished, you may deal 4 damage to chosen character.
author: Kenneth Anderson

name: Mrs. Incredible
subtitle: Determined Rescuer
rulesText:
<Shift> 5 {I}

\Pull Back\ Your characters gain <Resist> +1. 

\Regroup\ During your turn, whenever another character is banished in a challenge, you may ready chosen Super character. If you do, they can't quest for the rest of this turn.
author: Koni

name: Diablo
subtitle: Stone Servant
rulesText:
\Cruel Intent\ While you have a Villain character in play, this character gets +2 {S} and +1 {L}.

\Villainous Bond\ While this character is exerted, your Villain characters can't be challenged.
author: Sandy Lee

name: Three Arrows
rulesText: Deal 2 damage to chosen character. Then, you may deal 1 damage to another chosen character.
flavorText:
“I am Merida. Firstborn descendant of Clan DunBroch. And I’ll be shooting for my own hand."
—Merida
author: Kenneth Anderson

name: Card Advantage
rulesText: If an opposing character was banished in a challenge this turn, draw 2 cards.
flavorText:
"I didn't plant the vine! It was the Nine, the Nine!"
—Three of Spades
author: Isaiah Mesq

name: Touch the Sky
rulesText:
(A character with cost 2 or more can {E} to sing this song for free.)

Move a character of yours to a location for free. Then, draw cards equal to that location's {L}.
author: Alice Pisoni

name: Plunger Crossbow
rulesText: \Suction Technology\ {E}, 2 {I} — Draw a card, then choose and discard a card.
flavorText:
“All right, just let me adjust the trajectory.”
—Gadget Hackwrench
author: Jiahui Eva Gao

name: Syndrome's Remote
rulesText:
\Zero-Point Energy\ {E}, 2 {I} — Chosen character can't challenge during their next turn.

\Learn From Their Losses\ Whenever a Robot character is banished, you may banish this item to discard your hand and draw 2 cards.
author: Ricardo Caria / Pix Smith

name: Club Door
rulesText:
\Welcome Back, Sir\ If you have a character named Fat Cat in play, you may play this card for free.

\Cool Cats Only\ Your locations can't be challenged by characters with cost 2 or less.
author: Veronica Di Lorenzo / Livio Cacciatore

name: Fat Cat's Club
subtitle: Seedy Headquarters
flavorText: The hottest club for only the coolest cats in town.
author: Eri Welli

name: The Island of Nomanisan
subtitle: Syndrome's Headquarters
rulesText:
\Research & Development\ Robot characters get +1 {S} and +1 {W} while here.

\Cheap Shot\ Once during your turn, whenever a character banishes another character in a challenge while here, you may deal 2 damage to chosen character.
author: Nicolas Ky

name: Woody
subtitle: Waiting for a Friend
flavorText:
"Starin’ over the jungle from this huge vine
I think back to when I was laughin’ and feelin’ fine
My friends were all around to welcome me back home
But now I’m lost in Lorcana and oh so alone"
author: Federico Maria Cugliari

name: Rex
subtitle: Protective Dinosaur
rulesText:
<Bodyguard> (This character may enter play exerted. An opposing character who challenges one of your characters must choose one with Bodyguard if able.)

\Run Away!\ During an opponent's turn, when this character is banished, gain 1 lore.
author: Malia Ewart

name: Isabela Madrigal
subtitle: Such a Lovely Voice
rulesText:
<Singer> 5 (This character counts as cost 5 to sing songs.)

\New Motif\ When you play this character, if you removed 1 or more damage from one of your characters this turn, gain 1 lore.
author: Lynn's Magic Worlds

name: Mirage
subtitle: Super Recruiter
rulesText: \Business Arrangement\ When you play this character, if you have a Super or Hero character in play, you may draw a card.
flavorText: “The Supers aren’t gone, Mr. Incredible. You’re still here. You can still do great things.”
author: LadyShalirin

name: Edna Mode
subtitle: Fashion Designer
rulesText:
\No Capes!\ When you play this character, you may return chosen item with cost 2 or less to its player's hand. If you do, its player draws a card.

\Making Supers Fabulous\ Whenever this character quests, your Super characters get +1 {L} this turn.
author: Stefano Spagnuolo

name: Doc
subtitle: Taking Notes
rulesText: \Share Knowledge\ When you play this character, if you have another Seven Dwarfs character or a Princess character in play, draw a card.
flavorText: "Oh boy! Now this is a change grant . . . uh, a ranged pant . . . a strange plant!"
author: Juan Diego León

name: Buzz Lightyear
subtitle: Space Ranger
flavorText: “Environment appears habitable, but the flora seems to have undergone some strange mutations. Could be Zurg's influence."
author: Juan Diego León

name: Donald Duck
subtitle: Distracted Traveler
rulesText: \Burning Curiosity\ Whenever this character quests, if you played another character this turn, each opponent chooses and discards a card.
flavorText: In the wilderness of Lorcana, a little luck goes a long way.
author: Kenneth Anderson

name: Merida
subtitle: Gifted Archer
rulesText:
<Shift> 3 {I} (You may pay 3 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Merida.)

\Fierce Protection\ While this character is exerted, whenever an opposing character challenges, you may deal 1 damage to the challenging character.
author: LadyShalirin

name: Lyle Tiberius Rourke
subtitle: Crystallized Commander
rulesText:
<Shift> 4 {I} (You may pay 4 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Lyle Tiberius Rourke.)

\Plan's Changed\ When you play this character, put the top 2 cards of your deck into your discard. Then, you may return an action card with cost 4 or less from your discard to your hand.
author: Max Grecke

name: Mr. Incredible
subtitle: Bob Parr
flavorText: Dropping weight and getting in shape!
author: Alex Accorsi / Grace Tran

name: Daisy Duck
subtitle: Trendy Traveler
rulesText: \Break Is Over\ Whenever this character quests, if you played a character this turn, you may ready another chosen character. If you do, they can't quest for the rest of this turn.
flavorText: “Time to go. I don’t want to miss that sunset!”
author: Clio Schaffner

name: Kida
subtitle: Guardian of the Path
rulesText: \Natural Defense\ When you play this character, chosen opposing character gets -2 {S} this turn.
flavorText:
"I may be far from home, but I still know how to snare an intruder."
—Kida
author: Tim van Galen

name: Bruno Madrigal
subtitle: Oasis Oracle
rulesText:
\Find That Vision\ Once during your turn, whenever you remove damage from one of your characters, you may look at the top 2 cards of your deck. Put one into your hand and the other on the bottom of your deck.

\You'll Be Okay\ Whenever this character quests, you may remove all damage from chosen character.
author: Cristian Romero

name: Minnie Mouse
subtitle: Practical Traveler
rulesText: \Discerning Eye\ Whenever this character quests, if you played another character this turn, gain 1 lore.
flavorText: "I found a shortcut just over the ridge. We'll be at the oasis in no time!"
author: Kasia Brzezinska

name: Pocahontas
subtitle: Steadfast Traveler
rulesText: \Wandering Spirit\ Whenever this character quests, if you played another character this turn, return a location card from your discard to your hand.
flavorText:
“Sometimes the right path is not the easiest one.”
—Grandmother Willow
author: Malia Ewart

name: Incrediboy
subtitle: Buddy Pine
rulesText:
\Nerding Out\ When you play this character, if a Hero character is in play, gain 1 lore.

\Spoiler Alert\ This character also counts as being named Syndrome for <Shift>.
flavorText: "Not every superhero has powers, you know."
author: Eri Welli

name: Three Arrows
rulesText: Deal 2 damage to chosen character. Then, you may deal 1 damage to another chosen character.
flavorText:
“I am Merida. Firstborn descendant of Clan DunBroch. And I’ll be shooting for my own hand."
—Merida
author: Kenneth Anderson

name: Jessie
subtitle: Lively Cowgirl
rulesText:
\Part of a Family\ Whenever this character quests, if you have 2 or more other Toy characters in play, you may draw a card.

\Yodel-ay-hee-hoo!\ Whenever you pay 2 {I} or less to play a card, chosen opposing character gets -1 {S} until the start of your next turn.
author: Medusa Dollmaker

name: Isabela Madrigal
subtitle: Caring Cultivator
rulesText:
<Shift> 4 {I}

\Do No Wrong\ Whenever you remove damage from one of your characters, gain 1 lore for each 1 damage removed.
author: Viv Tanner

name: You've Got a Friend in Me
rulesText: Look at the top 4 cards of your deck. You may reveal up to 2 Toy character cards and put them into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.
author: Aubrey Archer

name: Frozone
subtitle: Super Cool
rulesText:
<Rush>

\Just Chill\ When you play this character, if you have another Super character in play, you may exert chosen opposing character.
author: Juan Diego León

name: Luisa Madrigal
subtitle: Confident Climber
rulesText:
<Shift> 3 {I}

\I Can Take It\ 1 {I} — Move up to 1 damage from chosen character of yours to this character. Then, if this character has 3 or more damage, move all damage from this character to chosen opposing character.
author: Marcin Karolewski

name: DunBroch Family Tapestry
rulesText:
\Torn Apart\ This item enters play exerted.

\Mend the Bond\ {E}, Banish this item — Each player shuffles all character cards from their discard into their deck.
author: Natalie Dombois

name: Alien
subtitle: True Believer
rulesText:
\We Are One\ This character gets +1 {S} for each other Toy character you have in play.

\He Has Been Chosen\ During your turn, when this character is banished, return another character card named Alien from your discard to your hand.
author: Cristian Romero

name: Milo Thatch
subtitle: Getting His Hands Dirty
rulesText:
<Ward>

\Scholar's Gambit\ When you play this character, you may choose and discard a card to return chosen character to their player's hand.

\Practical Knowledge\ At the end of your turn, if 2 or more cards were put into your discard this turn, draw a card.
author: John Loren

name: The Family Scattered
rulesText: Chosen opponent chooses 3 of their characters and returns one of those cards to their hand, puts one on the bottom of their deck, and puts one on the top of their deck.
author: Natalie Dombois

name: Jack-Jack Parr
subtitle: Incredible Potential
rulesText:
\Weird Things Are Happening\ At the start of your turn, you may put the top card of your deck into your discard. If its card type is:
• character, this character gets +2 {S} this turn.
• action or item, this character gets +2 {L} this turn.
• location, banish chosen character.
author: Arch Apolar

name: The Leviathan
subtitle: Guardian of Atlantis
rulesText: \It's a Machine!\ When you play this character, if 2 or more cards were put into your discard this turn, you may banish any number of chosen opposing characters with total {S} 10 or less.
author: Ian MacDonald

name: Mr. Incredible
subtitle: Super Strong
rulesText:
<Shift> 3 {I}

\Always United\ This character gets +2 {S} for each other character you have in play.

\Let's Do This!\ Whenever one of your Super characters challenges another character, draw a card.
author: Nicholas Kole

name: Zipper
subtitle: Big Helper
rulesText:
<Shift> 2 {I}

\Buzzing Enthusiasm\ Whenever this character quests, you may add his {W} to another chosen character's {S} this turn.
author: Marcin Karolewski

name: Kida
subtitle: Crystal Scion
rulesText:
<Shift> 6 {I}

\Flood of Power\ When you play this character, each player may put up to 5 cards from their discard into their inkwell facedown and exerted.

\The Path Revealed\ 7 {I} — Look at the top 2 cards of your deck. Put one into your hand and the other on the bottom of your deck.
author: Kenneth Anderson

name: What Else Can I Do?
rulesText: Look at the top 2 cards of your deck. Put one into your hand and the other into your inkwell facedown and exerted. If a character sang this song, your characters gain <Ward> until the start of your next turn.
author: Viv Tanner

name: Syndrome
subtitle: Out for Revenge
rulesText:
<Shift> 4 {I} 

\Got Me Monologuing!\ Whenever this character quests, return a Robot character card from your discard to your hand. Then, you may play or shift a Robot character with cost 8 or less for free.
author: Malia Ewart

name: Mrs. Incredible
subtitle: Determined Rescuer
rulesText:
<Shift> 5 {I} 

\Pull Back\ Your characters gain <Resist> +1.

\Regroup\ During your turn, whenever another character is banished in a challenge, you may ready chosen Super character. If you do, they can't quest for the rest of this turn.
author: Arch Apolar

name: Touch the Sky
rulesText: Move a character of yours to a location for free. Then, draw cards equal to that location's {L}.
author: Viv Tanner

name: Buzz Lightyear
subtitle: Jungle Ranger
rulesText:
<Shift> 5 {I}

\Take Charge\ When you play this character, you may return an action card with cost 7 or less from your discard to your hand.

\Advanced Training\ Whenever you play an action, chosen character gets +1 {L} this turn.
author: Koni

name: Merida
subtitle: Formidable Archer
rulesText:
\Full Quiver\ When you play this character, you may return an action card named Three Arrows from your discard to your hand.

\Steady Aim\ Whenever one of your actions deals damage to an opposing character, deal 2 damage to that character.
author: Jared Mathews

name: Ariel
subtitle: Curious Traveler
rulesText: \Familiar Ground\ Whenever this character quests, if you played another character this turn, chosen opposing character can't challenge and must quest during their next turn if able.
flavorText: "Isn't it wonderful? See if there's anything that catches your eye."
author: Clio Schaffner

name: Maleficent
subtitle: Imperious Traveler
rulesText: \Heed My Words\ Whenever this character quests, if you played another character this turn, you may exert chosen opposing character.
flavorText: “Bind this glimmer, fiendish flowers!"
author: Gaku Kumatori

name: Cruella De Vil
subtitle: Judgmental Traveler
rulesText: \You're Out of Fashion\ Whenever this character quests, if you played another character this turn, you may banish chosen damaged character.
flavorText: "Can I help you? Not with <your> sense of style, darling."
author: Koni

name: Queen of Hearts
subtitle: Impatient Traveler
rulesText: \Royal Command\ Whenever this character quests, if you played another character this turn, chosen character gains <Rush> this turn. (They can challenge the turn they're played.)
flavorText: Hours of walking in the heat had not improved her rosy disposition.
author: Magenta Muraca

name: Cinderella
subtitle: Resourceful Traveler
rulesText: \This and That\ Whenever this character quests, if you played another character this turn, you may put the top card of your deck into your inkwell facedown and exerted.
flavorText: No matter how difficult the journey, she always takes care of her friends.
author: Malia Ewart

name: Pocahontas
subtitle: Steadfast Traveler
rulesText: \Wandering Spirit\ Whenever this character quests, if you played another character this turn, return a location card from your discard to your hand.
flavorText:
“Sometimes the right path is not the easiest one.”
—Grandmother Willow
author: Malia Ewart

name: Dash Parr
subtitle: Lava Runner
rulesText:
<Rush> (This character can challenge the turn they're played.)

\Record Time\ This character can quest the turn he's played.
flavorText: "Whoa! A hidden place inside the mountain!"
author: Randy Bishop

name: Violet Parr
subtitle: Learning New Powers
rulesText:
<Evasive> (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)

\Deflect\ When you play this character, you may move 1 damage from chosen character to chosen opposing character.
author: Cristian Romero

name: Lenny
subtitle: Toy Binoculars
rulesText:
\Take a Good Look\ When you play this character, chosen opponent reveals their hand and discards an action card of your choice.

\Comin' Up Fast\ Once during your turn, whenever you play an action, you may ready this character.
author: Jiahui Eva Gao

name: Zipper
subtitle: Tiny Helper
flavorText:
"Crikey! I've seen fellas who are twice the size with half the heart as that wee dodger!"
—Monterey Jack
author: Natalie Dombois

name: Will o' the Wisp
subtitle: Forest Spirit
rulesText: \Come On Out\ When this character is banished in a challenge, you may return this card to your hand.
flavorText: They always come back when you need them.
author: Giulia Riva

name: Woody
subtitle: Jungle Guide
rulesText:
<Shift> 3 {I} (You may pay 3 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Woody.)

\Let's Get Movin'\ Whenever this character quests, draw a card. Then, you may play a character with cost 2 or less for free.

\Everyone Gather 'Round\ Your other Toy characters get +1 {W}.
author: Jochem van Gool

name: Woody
subtitle: Jungle Guide
rulesText:
<Shift> 3 {I} (You may pay 3 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Woody.)

\Let's Get Movin'\ Whenever this character quests, draw a card. Then, you may play a character with cost 2 or less for free.

\Everyone Gather 'Round\ Your other Toy characters get +1 {W}.
author: Jochem van Gool
